risk: Audit can drift from merged enforcement reality.
mitigation: Run known-gaps and readiness audit validators in CI.
closure: Audit reflects merged gates without overclaiming semantic readiness.

risk: Plans can be structurally valid but semantically wrong.
mitigation: Require Source of Truth Checks to reference changed target paths, their directory/file, or canonical sources only for canonical targets.
closure: Generic canonical sources cannot satisfy non-canonical target changes.
notes: Target/source semantic relevance is stronger; deep task intent still needs review.

risk: Connector evidence can be declared without proving result use.
mitigation: Require connector evidence, usage impact fields, and changed target linkage.
closure: Closed, verified, and complete by merged connector evidence checks and target-link simulations.

risk: Progress checkpoints can be backfilled after work.
mitigation: Require staged lifecycle markers and CI fixtures for missing timing evidence.
closure: Start/mid/pre-merge evidence cannot be silently omitted.

risk: Lessons can be syntactically complete but not useful.
mitigation: Add deeper lesson quality fields and prevention-evidence tests.
closure: Bug/debug closure has root cause, lesson, prevention, and test evidence.

risk: Reusable templates and patterns can be used repeatedly without systematic feedback.
mitigation: Require ratings manifest plus Route Plan rating evidence or waiver for concrete assets.
closure: Template and pattern usage creates rating evidence for future selection.
notes: Structural rating lifecycle is enforced; long-term score quality remains review-based.

risk: RTK can be available without influencing the agent decision.
mitigation: Require RTK source/action/result/decision evidence or explicit waiver in Route Plans.
closure: RTK plans require usage evidence or waiver for code/config/test changes.
notes: Structural decision-impact evidence is enforced; deep semantic proof remains future work.

risk: Graphify can run without findings being used.
mitigation: Require Route Plan or run trace to cite graph findings when graphify evidence exists.
closure: Graph findings are referenced in plan/run trace when available.
notes: Current gate proves run evidence only.

risk: Dead code and duplicate logic can remain outside narrow deterministic checks.
mitigation: Add language-specific analyzers or waiver-gated cleanup checklist.
closure: Unused imports, risky TODOs, disabled code, and deeper analyzers are covered or waived.

risk: CodeRabbit rate limits can leave review as vague manual work.
mitigation: Define mandatory self-review checklist and evidence when CodeRabbit is unavailable.
closure: PR review fallback evidence is required when external review is unavailable.

risk: Repair issue path is only proven by contract, not by a real failing main run.
mitigation: Observe or simulate safe failing main scenario in a controlled fixture.
closure: Repair issue path has direct observed evidence or safe simulation.
